seoTitle: Hobbys Yards vs Hogarth Range — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Hobbys Yards vs Hogarth Range: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hobbys Yards and Hogarth Range.
heading: Hobbys Yards vs Hogarth Range — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hobbys Yards, New South Wales and Hogarth Range, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hogarth Range has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Hobbys Yards (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hobbys Yards or Hogarth Range safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hobbys Yards has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Hogarth Range scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hobbys Yards scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Hogarth Range scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hobbys Yards or Hogarth Range?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hogarth Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
